title: Elcismia coriacea
taxonomy: Elcismia coriacea is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Alstroemeriaceae. More specifically, it belongs to the genus Elcismia. Further classification places it within the kingdom Plantae. The family Alstroemeriaceae is a group of flowering plants native to South America. Elcismia coriacea is native to Chile.
uses: Elcismia coriacea is a species of orchid. However, limited information is available about its medicinal uses. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. Herbal preparations made from Elcismia coriacea are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, colds, and respiratory infections.
